notable_excerpts: Our plants now consume about 86% of electricity from renewable sources.
We are also committed to send no waste to the landfills from our operations.
We recycled 52 million liters of water at our Bhopal plant through an artificial water reservoir.
Our carbon offsetting efforts continued with the planting of 66,000 trees anticipated to offset 660 tons of CO2 emissions.
First time that we see the All-Woman assembling the trucks on the assembly line in a truck plant.
We launched several green initiatives in Himachal Pradesh, Spiti in Kullu district.
Driving inclusivity in the CV industry, the Eicher Pro X is assembled on an All-Woman line.
Siddhartha was the MD & CEO of Eicher Motors, has taken over as an Executive Chairman of Eicher Motors.
Vinod - MD and CEO of VECV Commercial Vehicle business is now, apart from the MD & CEO of Commercial Vehicle, he is the Vice Chairman of Eicher Motors Board.
We also welcomed new Directors who bring in diverse experience from different sectors to Eicher.

chain_of_thought: The environmental disclosures are strong, with specific commitments to renewable energy, water recycling, and carbon offsetting. Social aspects highlight diversity and community initiatives, particularly the all-women assembly line. Governance mentions board changes and executive roles but lacks depth in areas like ethics and risk management.
strengths: Strong commitment to renewable energy and water recycling.
Innovative social initiatives like all-women assembly lines.
weaknesses: Limited detail on governance practices such as ethics and risk management.
